news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $264.5 mln.
Company reports lower sales and wider loss in Q3, plans to cut $65M in fixed costs by 2025. Sales $311.43M, down 16.6% YoY, adjusted EPS loss of 96 cents, EBITDA loss of $31.9M.
news.summary: Beyond, Inc. (NYSE:BYON) saw a decline in stock value following the release of its third-quarter 2024 earnings report. The company, which owns Overstock, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Zulily, disclosed sales of $311.43 million, marking a 16.6% decrease from the previous year and falling short of the projected $352.82 million. Additionally, Beyond reported an adjusted EPS loss of 96 cents, wider than the anticipated loss of 70 cents per share. Their adjusted EBITDA also suffered, with a loss of $31.9 million compared to $23.93 million in the prior year. These figures are in contrast to the positive news of a $40 million investment in Container Store stock. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Guardian study revealed benefits of adding genome sequencing to standard newborn screening, identifying 255 genetic conditions in diverse population.
news.summary: GeneDx, a company listed on Nasdaq with the symbol WGS, headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut, has released information regarding a study named GUARDIAN (Genomic Uniform-screening Against Rare Diseases In All Newborns). The study, published in JAMA (Journal of the American Medical Association), involves the largest research of its kind and focuses on utilizing whole genome sequencing (WGS) to detect 255 early onset genetic conditions in newborns. This study examines newborns from diverse backgrounds.

news.headline: Sonic Automotive's Q3 revenue missed at $3.491B (-4.2% YoY) and earnings per share at $1.26 (-38% YoY), but shares surged on dividend increase.
news.summary: Sonic Automotive, Inc. (NYSE: SAH) saw a notable increase in its stock value following the release of its third-quarter financial results and announcement of a 17% hike in its quarterly dividend. The company experienced a 4.2% decrease in total revenue compared to the previous year, reaching $3.491 billion instead of the anticipated $3.55 billion. Adjusted earnings per share were reported at $1.26, reflecting a decrease of 38% year-over-year, falling short of the estimated $1.43.Within the Franchised Dealerships segment, there was a 2% drop in same-store revenues and a 7% decline in same-store gross profit. Quarterly gross profit also saw a decrease of 7% year over year, amounting to $543.6 million. More details regarding the gross margin can be found on the full report accessible through Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Premium Guard Inc. will showcase expanded HD filter program at AAPEX 2024 in Memphis, with a new booth design.
news.summary: A company named Premium Guard Inc. (PGI) based in Memphis, Tennessee, recently revealed their involvement in the Automotive Aftermarket Products Expo (AAPEX) happening on October 24, 2024. The company, which can be found at www.premiumguard.com, is set to introduce a revamped booth at the expo to highlight its products more effectively.

news.headline: LICT Corp closes $100M financing with CoBank, extending facility to 2029 with improved covenant structure for growth.
news.summary: A company based in Rye, New York, known as LICT Corporation, recently announced the closing of a significant financial deal. The company, traded under OTC Pink as LICT, finalized a 5-year revolving credit facility worth $100 million with CoBank, ACB. This agreement extends the term of the facility until 2029 and doubles its size from $50 million to $100 million. Notably, the new loan structure offers enhanced covenants and increased flexibility for capital expenditures, aiming to improve services for communities and allow for potential growth opportunities through acquisitions.

news.headline: Three Pillars Capital, led by Gautam Goyal, acquires 308-unit Class-C multifamily property in Pasadena, TX.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Three Pillars Capital, headed by Gautam Goyal, revealed the purchase of The Life at Beverly Palms in Pasadena, TX. This Class-C multifamily property consists of 308 units. This acquisition marks a notable achievement for the company as it progresses in its ventures.

news.headline: Burundi plans to enhance power grid from 2025 with $1.4 billion investment.
TSS Solutions recognized as GrowFL Florida Company to Watch, among 50 honorees from 500 nominees for economic contributions.
news.summary: A company based in Melbourne, Florida, TSS Solutions, which is under Acorn Capital Management, has been named an honoree for the 14th Annual GrowFL Florida Companies to Watch Award. This program aims to acknowledge remarkable second-stage companies for their impact on the state's economy. Out of over 500 nominees, 50 companies were selected, covering various industries and showing significant potential for growth. TSS Solutions stood out for its inventive product offerings.

news.headline: Finalists announced in 2024 Create the Future Design Contest sponsored by Mouser Electronics; competition by SAE Media Group with COMSOL, honoring innovators worldwide.
news.summary: Mouser Electronics, Inc. in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, celebrates the finalists of the 2024 Create the Future Design Contest, a global challenge for engineers and innovators to create innovative designs. The competition, hosted by SAE Media Group and Tech Briefs magazine, is sponsored by COMSOL.Mouser congratulates the finalists for the 2024 Create the Future Design Contest, which is a global competition encouraging engineers and innovators to design the next groundbreaking invention. The challenge, organized by SAE Media Group and Tech Briefs magazine and sponsored by COMSOL, has selected its finalists to showcase their innovative designs.

news.headline: Commercial auto insurance faces profitability challenges due to economic and social inflation per Triple-I report.
news.summary: A recent Issues Brief from Triple-I revealed that the commercial auto insurance sector has been facing challenges in attaining underwriting profitability for an extended period. This struggle has persisted over several years, indicating ongoing financial difficulties within the industry.

news.headline: HR HealthCare appoints Dallas Donald as VP and Melissa Georgeoff as CCO of Patient Services division.
news.summary: In York, Pennsylvania on October 24, 2024, HR HealthCare made a significant announcement regarding the appointment of key executives. Dallas Donald has been designated as the Vice President, while Melissa Georgeoff has been appointed as the Chief Contracting Officer. They will be leading the Patient Services division of the company. This strategic move aims to strengthen the organization's operations and enhance patient care services. This decision marks a shift towards a more robust leadership structure within HR HealthCare.

news.headline: ServiceNow's market cap nears $200B as AI gains traction, attracting positive attention.
Invisible Technologies appoints Wes Green as SVP of Global Public Sector, aiming to expand operations in that sector.
news.summary: Invisible Technologies has named Wes Green as the Senior Vice President of Global Public Sector, based in San Francisco. Green's role will focus on leading the company's rapidly expanding public sector division.

news.headline: Investview, Inc. ("INVU") acquires Renu Laboratories Inc., boosting health and beauty products. New health and wellness biz aims to expand distribution.
news.summary: A company is set to introduce a new health and wellness venture aimed at broadening its current business offerings and leveraging its established distribution channels.

news.headline: Concentric AI gets $45M in Series B funding led by Top Tier Capital Partners and HarbourVest Partners, bringing total funding to over $67M. CyberFuture also invested.
news.summary: A company based in San Mateo, California, Concentric AI, known for its AI-powered solutions for autonomous data security posture management (DSPM), revealed today it successfully raised $45 million in a Series B funding round. This recent funding has pushed the company's total funding past the $67 million mark. Top Tier Capital Partners and HarbourVest Partners were the main leaders in this funding round, with CyberFuture, a global CISO investment alliance, joining in the investment following a comprehensive assessment of various DSPM offerings.

news.headline: ROWEN Wine Co. reveals 3 perfect scores on top wine selections.
news.summary: A recent report stated that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%, with a total of 5.8 million new jobs created in the past year. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4% and has led to a boost in consumer confidence and economic growth. The report also revealed an increase in average hourly earnings by 2.9% compared to last year, indicating positive trends in the labor market. Economists predict continued growth in the job market and further improvements in the overall economy.

news.headline: Gabby Wong of FranConnect elected to International Franchise Association Board of Directors, bringing expertise to drive business.
news.summary: With a vast background in franchising and a strong dedication to improving the business model, Gabby has been chosen to assist in leading the International Franchise Association (IFA), the oldest and largest franchise association in the world. This announcement was made in Washington on October 24, 2024, marking a significant step forward for the organization.

news.headline: Largest collection of rock 'n' roll art debuts in Las Vegas with works by music legends. Event on Nov 8.
news.summary: An upcoming exhibition and sale in Las Vegas will showcase the largest collection of art by legendary figures in rock and roll. The event will be held at Animazing Gallery and online starting November 7. A star-studded event is scheduled for November 8. The exhibition will feature artworks by iconic musicians such as Bob Dylan, Jimi Hendrix, Bono, David Bowie, and Steve, among others. This exclusive event presents a unique opportunity to view and purchase these rare pieces of rock and roll history.

news.headline: Archy secures $15M in Series A to revolutionize dental practices with AI-backed cloud platform, saving 80 hours/month.
news.summary: A cloud-based solution from Archy's software is capable of managing the daily operations of a complete dental practice. By automating various tasks and functions, it eliminates the need for expensive server infrastructure. This results in a significant saving of 80 hours per month in lost time for a single practice. The innovation was announced in San Jose, California on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Compa introduces Compa Skills, offering skills-based compensation intel for enterprise, filling gap in market.
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, Compa has launched Compa Skills, a revolutionary product in the market data software industry. The new solution offers enterprise organizations valuable skills-based compensation insights and precise job matching capabilities. Despite the rapid growth of the skills tech sector, with a focus on talent marketplaces, workforce planning, and recruitment tools, there has been a notable gap in linking skills with compensation. Compa Skills aims to fill this void, providing essential intelligence to organizations.

news.headline: Udemy releases Q3 2024 Global Workplace Learning Index showing growing demand for professional skills and key trends.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Udemy (Nasdaq: UDMY), a prominent online skills marketplace, released its Q3 2024 Global Workplace Learning Index. The report showcases emerging professional and technical skills and outlines major learning trends in global organizations. It offers valuable insights into the increasing demand for specific skills, aiding organizations in keeping up with evolving workforce dynamics in the rapidly advancing digital landscape.

news.headline: Brooks Rehabilitation's Transition to Practice Nursing Program in Jacksonville, Fla., was accredited by ANCC.
news.summary: Brooks Rehabilitation in Jacksonville, Florida, shared on October 24, 2024 that their Transition to Practice Nursing Program has received accreditation from the American Nurses Credentialing Center (ANCC) Practice Transition Accreditation Program (PTAP). This accreditation signifies that the program meets the standards set by ANCC for practice transition programs. The accreditation reflects the commitment of Brooks Rehabilitation to providing high-quality training for nurses entering practice.

news.headline: Cerebras triples industry-leading inference performance, achieves record 2,100 tokens/second on Llama 3.2 70B, 16x faster than GPUs.
news.summary: Today in Sunnyvale, California, Cerebras Systems, a leading high performance AI compute company, achieved a groundbreaking milestone by reaching a performance of 2,100 tokens/second on their Llama 3.2 70B system. This marks a significant advancement, being 16 times faster than the fastest GPU solution known and 68 times speedier than major hyperscale clouds according to Artificial Analysis, an independent benchmarking entity. Additionally, Cerebras' Inference system outperformed GPUs in serving Llama 70B more than 8 times faster than they handle Llama 3B, resulting in an impressive aggregate increase of 184 in processing efficiency.

news.headline: Smashing app by Goodreads co-founder officially launches out of beta, includes AI prompts like 'Show All Sides' to enhance reading experience.
news.summary: The co-founder of Goodreads has introduced a new app called Smashing which uses community collaboration and artificial intelligence to recommend top articles, blogs, and other content tailored to the user's interests. Along with this, Smashing AI Questions feature provides enhanced context to the content. This innovative platform was launched in San Francisco on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: LambdaTest introduces automated accessibility testing with Playwright to ensure web accessibility compliance, improving digital experiences and regulatory compliance.
news.summary: LambdaTest, a company based in NOIDA, India, and SAN FRANCISCO, has recently launched a new Playwright integration aimed at automating accessibility checks. This innovative tool is designed to ensure inclusive digital experiences and regulatory compliance by streamlining the process of verifying accessibility standards. LambdaTest's Playwright integration aims to enhance the efficiency of accessibility testing, ultimately benefiting users and businesses alike.

news.headline: ApiJect Systems receives grant to develop low-cost contraceptive delivery device for LMICs using Blow-Fill-Seal technology.
news.summary: A grant has been awarded to support the creation of a cost-effective contraceptive delivery device for Low- and Middle-Income Countries (LMICs). The grant will cover the design and development of the device, which aims to provide multi-month contraceptive options. The technology of Blow-Fill-Seal will be investigated for the container closure and subcutaneous injection delivery system, marking a significant advancement in this area. This initiative will help improve access to contraception in LMICs, making a positive impact on reproductive health in these regions.

news.headline: Moving Mountains presents new luxury travel option in Colorado Rocky Mountains - Apex Collection offers ultimate privacy and hyper-personalization for global travelers. #LuxuryTravel #MovingMountains #ApexCollection
news.summary: In Steamboat Springs, Colorado on October 24, 2024, Moving Mountains is launching the Apex Collection, catering to luxury travelers in the Colorado Rocky Mountains. This exclusive offering aims to provide top-tier services and experiences to guests. Moving Mountains, a prominent hospitality company in Beaver Creek and Breckenridge, is renowned for its exceptional accommodations and service standards.

news.headline: Box and AWS team up to enhance enterprise content with generative AI models like Anthropic’s Claude and Amazon Titan.
news.summary: In Seattle and Redwood City, there was a recent announcement by Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) and Amazon Web Services (AWS), an Amazon company (NASDAQ: AMZN), about their enhanced strategic partnership. This collaboration aims to assist organizations in developing new applications and enhancing productivity through generative AI. Customers of Box now have the ability to utilize foundation models within Box AI via Amazon Bedrock. The initial models available include Anthropic’s Claude and Amazon Titan.

news.headline: EQ Bank awards 5 emerging digital artists for contributions to contemporary art. Toronto, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Five up-and-coming artists have been acknowledged for their noteworthy contributions to contemporary digital art in Toronto. This recognition comes from EQ Bank, the digital platform of a prominent Canadian Challenger Bank™. The bank aims to revolutionize banking and enhance the lives of individuals. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Tangoe's Tangoe One Mobile wins "Mobility Management Solution Provider of the Year" award in 2024 Mobile Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Tangoe, an established IT expense management provider, revealed today that its managed mobility service called Tangoe One Mobile has been honored with the title of "Mobility Management Solution Provider of the Year" by the Mobile Breakthrough awards program. This prestigious award acknowledges outstanding companies, technologies, and products within the worldwide wireless and mobile sector. Recipients of this accolade are regarded as leaders in the mobile industry and showcase innovative mobile solutions. Tangoe's recognition underscores its position as a leader in the field, having served the industry for more than 20 years.

news.headline: Propy launches crypto escrow service with Coinbase Prime for real estate transactions with Bitcoin & Ethereum.
news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida, on October 24, 2024, Propy, a pioneering company in Web3 technology and a leading provider of title and escrow services for real assets in the United States, unveiled a secure solution for real estate and high-value transactions. The launch of this innovative solution utilizes Bitcoin and Ethereum for added security.

news.headline: BioSolutions Conference & Expo in Fresno, CA marks 10 years on Feb 18-20, 2025, for North American growers and consultants.
news.summary: The BioSolutions Conference & Expo, a leading event for specialty crop and floriculture growers, consultants, and researchers in North America, will mark its 10th anniversary on February 18-20, 2025, in Fresno, CA. This milestone conference is a significant gathering for the industry, attracting participants to discuss cutting-edge advancements and exchange ideas.

news.headline: Bumble Bee Seafoods adds 11 new products for National Seafood Month, expands canned, pouched, kit-based offerings.
news.summary: In conjunction with National Seafood Month, Bumble Bee Seafoods, a prominent player in the industry, has introduced 11 fresh products to its acclaimed range of canned, pouched, and kit-based seafood items. The company's commitment to innovation is evident through this expansion, catering to the evolving preferences of consumers.

news.headline: GIGABYTE announces availability of AORUS Z890 motherboards for Intel Core Ultra processors, enhancing performance with D5 Bionic Corsa.
news.summary: In Taipei on October 24, 2024, GIGABYTE, a top computer brand, declared that the AORUS Z890 series motherboards are now accessible for buying. These motherboards are crafted to enhance the capabilities of the newest Intel® Core™ Ultra processors, resulting in groundbreaking performance for tech enthusiasts looking to elevate their computing experience.

news.headline: KeyPoint Credit Union introduces auto loans for ITIN holders, aiding underserved residents in mobility.
news.summary: A financial institution based in San Jose, California, KeyPoint Credit Union, has recently introduced a new auto loan program tailored to assist underserved residents with mobility. This initiative aims to cater to individuals in need of financial assistance and support within the community. The program, launched on October 24, 2024, reflects the organization's dedication to inclusivity and community welfare. By offering specialized auto loans, KeyPoint Credit Union strives to enhance access to mobility solutions for those facing challenges in obtaining traditional financing. This strategic move showcases the institution's commitment to supporting the community and addressing the specific needs of its residents.

news.headline: Radiopharmaceuticals market to hit $26.51B by 2031, growing at 14.4% CAGR due to rising chronic diseases.
news.summary: The radiopharmaceuticals market is seeing significant growth attributed to the rising number of chronic disease cases. A detailed analysis in the report covers market trends, key players, market share, growth analysis, and future prospects. Released in New York on October 24, 2024, the report from The Insight highlights the increasing demand for radiopharmaceuticals due to the surging incidences of chronic diseases.
